title: Reviks PvP+
description: This resource pack is very good for pvp :)
body:
![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85057effe80884ab0612c3d5eedfb1e84724db30.png)
## Reviks PvP+

•New versions usually every week

• Minimalistic resource pack enhancing Minecraft aesthetics and usability

• Tools like picks, shovels, and axes have been redesigned for better functionality and clarity

• GUI elements such as menus, inventories, and displays are cleaner and more user-friendly

• Focuses on small but meaningful changes without compromising the vanilla style

• Optimizes visuals and gameplay for a pleasant and clear experience

• Perfect for players who want subtle improvements while keeping the original Minecraft feel
